items.claim: Fatima Klein's training with Erin Blanchfield will neutralize Tabitha Ricci's grappling.
items.quote: she trains with Aaron Blanchfield so I don't think the ground of Tabitha reaches will be any trouble for her.

items.claim: Fatima Klein has a significant reach and striking advantage over Tabitha Ricci.
items.quote: Fatima is going to be a lot longer a lot rangier good on the feet. I think she'll be able to light her up on the feet.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci struggles to close the distance against longer strikers.
items.quote: I just don't see her being able to close the distance and get in.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a weak chin and cannot take a good punch.
items.quote: I don't think Chase can take the best punch.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's striking ability is significantly behind his grappling level.
items.quote: I just think that his striking's very very behind.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan's elusive, bouncy striking style is a bad matchup for Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: Christian's going to be in and out in and out creative... that's why I think Jared did good against [Rodriguez] whereas Christian's going to be in and out.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is in a decline due to his age.
items.quote: if this was a younger Jarrett Kenner, I'd probably be going Jarrett, but unfortunately, I am not.
